events.title: Moms in Prayer
events.description: An hour of prayer for our kids, schools, and community. (Coordinated by Debra Smith.)

events.title: Overcomers
events.description: Christ-centered 12-step support network for addiction and compulsive behaviors. Open to individuals, families, and loved ones affected by addictive behavior.

events.title: Young Adults (18-25)
events.description: Bible study, peer accountability, and fellowship for young adults aged roughly 18-25. Currently studying the Gospel of Matthew. Refreshments provided.

events.title: Community Meals
events.description: Wednesday-night community meal before midweek programs.

events.title: Awana
events.description: Bible-rooted clubs for kids age 2 through 5th grade (Puggles, Cubbies, Sparks, TnT). Runs September through April.

events.title: BSF Satellite Class for Women
events.description: Bible Study Fellowship satellite class. (NOTE: /calendar/ lists Thursdays; /mvc-adults/ lists Tuesdays starting Sept 15, 2026. Verify before launch.)

events.title: Women's Ministry Saturday Fellowship
events.description: Monthly women's gathering on the second Saturday — teaching, breakfast, and fellowship.

events.title: Elbert County Men of Valor
events.description: Monthly free breakfast and fellowship gathering for men. Contact: Pastor Brian Janes · 303-243-0167.

events.title: MVC Men's Breakfast
events.description: Monthly potluck breakfast for the men of MVC. (NOTE: /calendar/ says 4th Sunday 6:45 AM; /men/ says Last Sunday 7:00 AM. Verify before launch.) Contact: Colin Kelly · 720-656-5438.
